_comment: Copy this file to config.json and edit music_path for your machine. config.json is gitignored so your library location stays local. The AcoustID API key is NEVER stored here — it is read from $ACOUSTID_API_KEY or the macOS Keychain (service 'acoustid'). Every key is documented in docs/CONFIGURATION.md.
_comment_filters: Narrow the library without moving files. Entries are directories, relative to music_path or absolute; a trailing /** or /* is optional. exclude_paths always wins; matching is case-insensitive. Empty include_paths means all of music_path. See docs/CONFIGURATION.md#path-filters.
_comment_music_app: macOS only — forced off on Windows/Linux, where Earditor still writes tags and embeds art but adds nothing to a playlist.
